locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

relations.subject: Red-billed tyrannulet
relations.evidence: The red-billed tyrannulet inhabits the canopy and edges of tropical forest in the Andean foothills and up into lower humid subtropical montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Red-billed tyrannulet
relations.evidence: "The primary threat to this species stems from deforestation, with parts of its range under pressure from logging, mining, agriculture and road building." It is considered "apparently rare and local (overlooked?)" in Ecuador and "uncommon (but often overlooked?)" in Peru. It does occur in a few protected areas
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
